name: Olive Focaccia
recipeIngredient: Firmer dough than Rustic Bread (See recipe)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix well and let the dough reach a temperature of 75-78°F.
2. Add thyme, chopped Moroccan olives, and Kalamata olives.
3. Let the dough rest for 5-10 minutes.
4. Finish kneading by hand on a floured board until smooth and rounded.
5. Cover with plastic and let rise 2-3 hours in an oiled bowl.
6. When ready, indent the top of the loaf with a knife.
7. Refrigerate overnight.
8. On the following day, let the temperature reach 72-74°F before baking for 45 minutes according to Rustic Bread instructions.
